title: Fluffy Malaysian Chicken Skewers
description: A paleo-friendly Malaysian dish featuring chicken skewers with a citrusy and pillowy texture, perfect for a post-workout meal. It incorporates Italian seasoning for added flavor.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, lime juice, Italian seasoning, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breast pieces to the bowl and mix until they are well coated with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Broil the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through and slightly charred.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the chicken skewers hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
